chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1146 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.5508/2023 2. For hearing of main case 17.12.2024 Mr. Abdul Latif Chandio, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General This petition is seeking implementation of order of the Customs Appellate Tribunal. In view of the judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Khalid alias Muhammad Khalid and others vs. Collector of Customs (Adjudication), Customs House Lahore etc. (Civil Petition No.3391 of 2024), petition is not maintainable, hence, the same is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
